# a2waspwarfare LLM entrypoints

Primary wiki: Home.md
Compact bootstrap: AI-Assistant-Guide.md
Execution playbook: AI-Assistant-Developer-Guide.md
Compact agent page: LLM-Agent-Entry-Pack.md
Human agent brief: Agent-Context.md
Machine agent brief: agent-context.json
Progress snapshot: agent-status.json
Current source status snapshot: Current-Source-Status-Snapshot.md
Coordination state: agent-collaboration.json
Event feed: agent-events.jsonl
Worklog: Agent-Worklog.md
Validation gate: docs/validate-wiki.ps1
Wiki parity gate: Tools/TestWikiParity.ps1 plus mirror Tools/ValidateWiki.ps1 -SkipGitDiffCheck
Compatibility audit: Arma-2-OA-Compatibility-Audit.md
External reference gateway: Arma-2-OA-External-Reference-Guide.md
Command version reference: Arma-2-OA-Command-Version-Reference.md

Rules:
- Verify source-backed claims against the local repository before publishing them.
- Use Arma 2 Operation Arrowhead 1.64 references for engine behavior.
- Avoid Arma 3-era scripting assumptions such as remoteExec, remoteExecutedOwner, isRemoteExecuted, allPlayers, SQF params, isEqualTo, private _var = value, parseSimpleArray, setGroupOwner, groupOwner, modern select range/filter forms, BIS_fnc_MP and CBA/ACE helpers unless OA/source proof exists.
- Treat publicVariable and setVariable [..., true] as replicated last-value state only; they do not prove server authority, event-history replay or full marker/queue collection sync.
- Keep docs-only work out of gameplay mission source unless the user explicitly requests code changes.
- If agent-collaboration.json activeClaims lists a command-reference or compatibility lane, leave that lane's named files to its owner unless it signs off or the user redirects.
- Treat Agent-Worklog.md as append-only history; append-order supersessions and Current-Source-Status-Snapshot.md beat stale timestamped notes.
- Run the wiki validator after meaningful documentation or machine-context edits.
